base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_dragon_skull_cannon_spit — a character from 1986 castlevania. Stationary dragon-skull — mounted on wall/ceiling. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stationary dragon-skull — mounted on wall/ceiling; 2-frame jaw-open/close as it spits red fireball forward on a timer. Level 2 Main Hall
